title: RPP Balloon Shaped Plastic Balloons Weights pack of 10 (Blue)
features: DURABLE DESIGN: These plastic balloon weights are constructed to withstand drops and impacts for long-lasting use.
Set includes 10 plastic balloon shaped weights
Appropriately sized, flat hole at the top of every weight for easy ribbon threading and tying
Ideal for weighing down individual latex balloons to space them out in any venue or hand out to kids without worry of the balloon floating
Manufactured right here within the UK
description: Our plastic balloon weights are manufactured right here in the UK and are available in a wide range of colours so whatever your special occasion is from wedding, anniversary, engagement, birthday, prom, new years or Christmas we are certain we have the right weights to match the colour scheme of your balloon decorations. With a sensibly sized flat opening at the top of each weight, tying them with ribbon to balloons is effortless. These weights are ideally suited to tying individual helium filled latex balloons to spread them out over your party venue or to hand out individual balloons to kids at a party without concern over floating off balloons. Features: set of 10 Plastic coloured balloon shaped weights, each weighing approximately 9 grams, is 8cm long and 6cm wide. Please note that due to slight differences in lighting and the screens on which this listing is viewed the exact shade of the product may appear slightly different from the pictures. If you have any questions or queries please do not hesitate to get in touch with us and we will be happy to assist you in any way we can. Not siutible for children under 3.
